name: decibel-intel
description: Look up any wallet, leaderboard, vaults, and market data on Decibel -- the perps DEX on Aptos.
long_description: Decibel Intel gives you research tools for the Decibel perpetuals DEX on Aptos. Look up any trader's positions, P&L, and trade history. Browse the leaderboard. Explore public vaults. Check market data across all pairs. Requires a free Geomi API key (takes 2 minutes to get).

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.description: Get top Decibel traders ranked by P&L, ROI, or volume

tools.name: get_wallet_positions
tools.description: Get any wallet's open positions on Decibel

tools.name: get_wallet_overview
tools.description: Get any wallet's trading performance on Decibel

tools.name: get_wallet_trades
tools.description: Get any wallet's trade history on Decibel

tools.name: get_subaccounts
tools.description: List all trading subaccounts under an owner wallet

tools.name: get_vaults
tools.description: Get all public Decibel vaults with TVL, APR, and performance

tools.name: get_funding_rates
tools.description: Get prices, open interest, and volume for all Decibel markets

api_key.title: Geomi API Key
api_key.description: Your Geomi API key for Aptos Mainnet. Get one free at geomi.dev -- create an account, make a project, create a Server key for Aptos Mainnet. The key starts with 'aptoslabs_...' Free tier gives $10/month in credits.
